titleStmt.title: SII 33.3: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 3. (A.R. No. 94 of 1946.) Inuguṇta, Venkatagiri Taluk, Nellore District.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1524, Śubhakṛit, Jyēshṭha śu. 14, corresponding to 1602 A.D. May 24, Monday.
It records the gift of lands by Śrimanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gobbūri Jaggarājayya for maintance of the tank at Inuguṇta for its maintenance, for the merit of Obarājayya Tirumala.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1524
Agunēṭi śubhakṛtsa(ṁvatsa*)ra jyēṣṭa śuddha 14 śrīmadrājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara vīrapratāpa śrī vīrabhujabala vīraveṁka
ṭapatirāyadēva mahārāyalayyavāru penugoṁḍa nagaramaṁ
du vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍai sa(rva)sāmrājyaṁ sēyucu(ṁ)ḍa
gānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara gobbūri jaggarājayya
dēvamaharājulayyavāru yinuguṁṭa ceruvuku Iccina
dha¨rmmaśāsanakramameṭlannanu Obarājayya tirumala
gāriki puṇyaṁgānu ceruvukiṁdi (ku)ṁṭa tūmulu
velicelavri lcilu ya(lla) paḍi ceruvuke Isti
Iyyamani yavvaru kīḍāḍinānu yavvaru Āśi
ṁcinānu gaṁgaka¨rta gōvubrāhmanuni vadhiI
ṁcina pāpānabōduru ta(lli taṁ)ḍri vadhiIṁ
cina pāpānabōduru . śrī
Digital edition of SII 33.3 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
